findings.title: Install/init and template scope conflicts with the issue
findings.detail: Scope conflict between issue and spec on install/init/template.
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 2 — scope expanded to include install/init/template.

findings.title: Canonical current-truth specs are not defined
findings.detail: Unclear whether openspec/specs/ is intentionally empty.
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 2 — openspec/specs/ explicitly starts empty.

findings.title: Historical change-record migration format is underspecified
findings.detail: No defined file structure or content mapping for migrated records.
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 2 — FR-004 expanded with full migration rules.

findings.title: Empty openspec/specs/ conflicts with issue current-truth goal
findings.detail: Persistent finding: reviewer flags that empty openspec/specs/ contradicts issue intent. Spec addresses this with detailed rationale in FR-002 citing Non-goals and inventory results.
findings.suggested_resolution: FR-002 expanded with rationale, SC-001 updated to explicitly state structure-only migration. Follow-up issue for capability specs.
findings.notes: Accepted risk: The issue text literally says 'migrate into openspec/specs/' but upon inventory all existing entries are change records, not capability specs. FR-002 provides detailed rationale. A follow-up issue will address authoring capability specs. User confirmed accepted_risk at Round 4.

findings.title: Bootstrapped project contents are not defined
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 2 — bootstrap payload defined.

findings.title: Idempotent migration mechanism is not defined
findings.detail: No migration entry point defined (script vs manual vs committed state).
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 3 — FR-007 defines bin/specflow-migrate-openspec.sh.

findings.title: Final location of retained command assets is unresolved
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 3 — FR-006 states global/ remains, with command-audit.md artifact.

findings.title: Idempotence does not handle partial migrations
findings.detail: Naive proposal.md check would skip partially-migrated entries.
findings.suggested_resolution: Resolved in Round 4 — FR-007 uses atomic .migrating/ temp directory pattern with 3-state detection.

findings.title: FR-008 unclear about preserving existing init/template outputs
findings.detail: FR-008 did not clarify whether changes are additive or replacement.
findings.suggested_resolution: Fixed — FR-008 now states change is additive, existing bootstrap artifacts preserved.
